features.name: $random system function in sequential logic
features.description: Code should include the $random system function called inside an always block to produce a 32-bit signed random integer during simulation, exercising the non-synthesizable simulation-only task

features.name: $random seeded call in initial block
features.description: Code should include a call to $random with an explicit integer seed variable inside an initial block, which is the canonical simulation-only random initialisation pattern

features.name: blackbox module masking unsupported simulation tasks
features.description: Code should include a blackbox-attributed module that wraps an unsupported simulation-only task, used as a portability workaround when a simulator or backend cannot process the original task directly
features.snippet:
(* blackbox *)
module sim_random_gen (
    input  wire        clk,
    input  wire [31:0] seed,
    output wire [31:0] rand_out
);
endmodule
